ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag on this card.

trivia_bullets.text: Dog Umbra's type line is 'Enchantment — Aura.' It carries no creature subtype. The word 'Dog' describes the spirit depicted in the art, not a creature type. Dog Umbra does NOT count as a Dog for any Dog-tribal synergies (Pack Leader's lord effect, Rin and Seri token triggers, etc.) and cannot be fetched or buffed by any Dog-matters card.
sources: Scryfall API: type_line field for card ID 8d4ba710-eddb-40ca-b2fe-0e4e778aab9c

trivia_bullets.text: Dog Umbra is one of the first cards printed with the 'umbra armor' keyword, a rename of the earlier 'totem armor' keyword. The original totem armor debuted in Rise of the Eldrazi (2010), where all 10 totem-armor auras used the '[Animal] Umbra' naming pattern. Wizards of the Coast renamed the keyword to 'umbra armor' after a cultural sensitivity review determined that 'totem' carries significant meaning in Indigenous cultures. Existing totem armor cards were Oracle-updated to use the new term.
sources: Wizards of the Coast mechanics article for Modern Horizons 3 (magic.wizards.com)
Draftsim: Totem Armor and Umbra Armor in MTG, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Modern Horizons 3, released June 14, 2024, is a draft-innovation set that injects cards directly into Modern without passing through Standard. It returns over 70 keyword abilities including umbra armor. Dog Umbra's dual function — pacifying enchantment on an opponent's creature ('can't attack or block') versus protective armor on your own — makes it an unusual Aura whose behavior switches based on which player controls the enchanted creature.
sources: Wizards of the Coast mechanics article for Modern Horizons 3

trivia_bullets.text: Dog Umbra has an EDHREC rank of 6,931, indicating moderate Commander adoption. It is legal in Modern, Pauper, Legacy, and Commander. Its {1}{W} cost with Flash gives it an above-rate efficiency profile; the life-saver / attack-stopper dual role at two mana with instant timing is the primary draw in enchantress and white control shells.
